message:
✨ SCG highlight, amber bolt icon, member click plays correct stream (#105)

- Highlight playing SCG row in both channel list and guide views
- Clear _selectedIndex when SCG plays so no individual row stays lit
- Replace shield icon with bolt icon in amber (like favorite star)
- Click specific member in expanded SCG plays that member (not first)
- Show 'Loading Smart Channel groups…' during startup

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
